qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: The following relations are used to store data about students, courses, enrollment of students in courses and teachers of courses. Attributes for primary key in each relation are marked by `*'. Students (rollno*, sname, saddr) courses (cno*, cname) enroll(rollno*, cno*, grade) teach(tno*, tname, cao
